claimText: - Deeds Registration System: Deeds are registered in government record but registration does not itself guarantee title, ownership is proven by tracing chain of deeds.

claimText: - Title Registration (Torrens) System: Registration is conclusive proof of title, the government guarantees the register and ownership changes only with registration; the owner gets a certificate of title.
